title: duziy's PvP Optimized
description: A modpack designed to improve performance, add HUD mods for PvP, and quality of life improvements.
body:
---

## 🛠️ Troubleshooting & Support

* **Animation Issues:** If animations look strange, it's likely caused by **Animatium**.
* **Toggle Command:** `/animatium on/off`
* In some versions of the modpack, this mod may not be installed!

* **Are hitboxes on and you dont want them on.**
* Try pressing **F3 + B** and if that does not work, try **F3 + \** as I rebound it in some versions of the modpack!


* **Need More Help?** Join my community Discord or add me directly: ***duziy***.

---

## 🚀 About the Modpack

**duziy’s PvP Optimized** is a performance modpack built on the **Fabric Mod Loader**. It’s designed to provide maximum fps while maintaining essential HUD and quality-of-life features.

### Key Features

| Feature | Description |
| --- | --- |
| **Performance** | Powered by **Sodium** and **Lithium** for massive FPS gains. |
| **OptiFine Parity** | Native support for Shaders, Connected Textures, and Zoom. |
| **Always Current** | Frequently updated to the latest versions with bloat removed. |
| **Customizable** | Built to be a stable base, feel free to add or remove your own mods! |

---

## 📜 Credits

This pack is inspired by and uses configurations from the **Additive Modpack**. I have personalized the experience by adding and removing some mods.

🔗 [Original Additive Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/additive)

---

**Don't forget to check for updates regularly to ensure you have the latest stability fixes and performance tweaks!**

---
